## Public Scope Check

- [ ] This PR targets the public Tokenmon codebase, public docs, public tests,
      or public release tooling.
- [ ] This PR does not add private maintainer workflows, internal planning docs,
      original art review files, AI operator assets, or machine-local state.
- [ ] This PR does not include prompt text, model response text, API keys, or
      private machine-local secrets.
- [ ] Any behavior or release change is documented in the same PR.
- [ ] Provider changes link to an accepted provider proposal issue, or this PR
      is explicitly marked as draft/RFC.

## Verification

- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] `./scripts/ai-verify --mode pr`
